series_metadata.series_title: Applications and Application Materials to participate in ResultsOHIO
series_metadata.series_description: Completed applications submitted to the ResultsOHIO department by applicants that wish to participate in the ResultsOHIO program. Documentation includes applicant information, tax clearance authorizations, project description, and any submitted attachments. Also includes documentation used by ResultsOHIO to determine eligibility and scoring.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain applications until the later of (a) 2 years, or (b) conclusion of a pay for success contract with the Treasurer’s office, plus 2 additional years. ; Electronic: Retain applications until the later of (a) 2 years, or (b) conclusion of a pay for success contract with the Treasurer’s office, plus 2 additional years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
